message:
Update dependencies, add .rchignore, and sync beads issue tracker

Cargo.lock: dependency tree update reflecting new quick-xml and zip
crate additions for Microsoft 365 Word/OneNote document support, plus
transitive dependency resolution.

.rchignore: new file configuring remote compilation helper (rch) to
exclude .claude/, .codex-targets/, and .beads/ directories from
remote sync, reducing transfer overhead during remote builds.

.beads/issues.jsonl: sync issue tracker state with current project
work items.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
